title: Saudi defences intercept, destroy 9 drones in Eastern Region
summary: The drones were intercepted and destroyed in the Eastern Region
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
PHOTO

RIYADH - The Saudi Ministry of Defence announced the interception and destruction of nine drones. 

The Saudi Press Agency (SPA) quoted Ministry of Defence Spokesperson Major General Turki Al-Malki as saying that the drones were intercepted and destroyed in the Eastern Region.

Article Source: Emirates News Agency (WAM)
